mapper.select: SELECT s.* FROM songs s INNER JOIN playlist_songs ps ON s.id = ps.song_id WHERE ps.playlist_id = #{playlistId} ORDER BY ps.sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO playlist_songs (playlist_id, song_id, sort_order) VALUES (#{playlistId}, #{songId}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM playlist_songs WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId} AND song_id = #{songId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM playlist_songs WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId} AND song_id = #{songId}
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(sort_order), 0) FROM playlist_songs WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId}
